turns.svg:
<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Background stars -->
  <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="120" cy="180" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="300" cy="100" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="450" cy="300" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="200" cy="400" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="400" cy="450" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="80" cy="350" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="480" cy="150" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="350" cy="480" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="100" cy="250" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="420" cy="80" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="250" cy="40" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="500" cy="400" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="150" cy="480" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="30" cy="300" r="2" fill="white"/>

  <!-- Mars planet -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="150" fill="#C1440E"/>

  <!-- Surface features -->
  <!-- Darker region 1 -->
  <ellipse cx="220" cy="200" rx="70" ry="40" fill="#8B3200" transform="rotate(-30 220 200)"/>
  <!-- Darker region 2 -->
  <ellipse cx="300" cy="320" rx="50" ry="30" fill="#8B3200" transform="rotate(20 300 320)"/>
  <!-- Lighter region (ice cap) -->
  <ellipse cx="180" cy="150" rx="30" ry="20" fill="#E08B60"/>
  <!-- A small crater -->
  <circle cx="380" cy="180" r="15" fill="#8B3200" opacity="0.7"/>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }
